Played cards with even rank give +4 Mult when scored (10, 8, 6, 4, 2)
Played cards with odd rank give +31 Chips when scored (A, 9, 7, 5, 3)
Adds the sell value of all other owned Jokers to Mult (Currently +8 Mult)
